Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 46 

COPD_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the COPD and bronchiectasis indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) and bronchiectasis indicator. The 
variable will be blank for beneficiaries that
